title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and technical expertise in polymer extrusion within the Charlotte manufacturing sector.

title: York Police Arrest Convicted Felon on Murder Charge
summary: York police have arrested a convicted felon in connection with a deadly shooting that occurred late Friday night.
charlotte_impact: Addresses crime and public safety concerns in the York community.

title: Charges Expected in Deadly Iredell County Crash
summary: Investigators believe speed was a contributing factor in a fatal collision in Iredell County.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about the dangers of speeding and its consequences on roadways.

title: Cool Weekend Forecast with Rain Likely
summary: Charlotte is expected to have a cool weekend with rain and drizzle on Saturday morning, followed by a warm-up next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information relevant to residents planning weekend activities.

title: Crash Closes I-485 Inner in Matthews
summary: Emergency crews responded to a crash on I-485 Inner in Matthews around 5:30 a.m. Saturday, causing road closures.

title: Teachers Rally in Gaston County for Higher Pay

title: May Day March in Charlotte Advocates for Worker Rights
summary: Hundreds marched along Central Avenue in Charlotte for International Workers’ Day, demanding stronger worker and immigration protections.

title: CMPD Chief Prioritizes Officer Wellness, Community Trust
summary: Chief Estella Patterson discusses crime trends, officer wellness, and strategies to strengthen public safety in Charlotte.

title: Fake Grenade Prompts Evacuation at Caldwell County Walmart

title: Charlotte Water Implements Mandatory Water Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water has implemented mandatory water restrictions due to worsening drought conditions in the Carolinas.

title: Protestors Target Duke Energy Over Proposed Rate Increase
summary: Charlotte protestors oppose Duke Energy's proposed 18% rate increase, which could significantly raise residential customer bills.

title: Mecklenburg County Parks Issue Burn Ban
summary: Mecklenburg County Park and Recreation has implemented a mandatory burn ban due to severe drought conditions, starting May 4.

title: WakeMed and Atrium Health Propose $2 Billion Merger
summary: WakeMed and Atrium Health propose a $2 billion merger, potentially creating one of the largest healthcare networks in the state.
